constraints.description: Each rescue team is assigned to a different zone (no two teams in the same zone)
constraints.label: Unique zone assignments
constraints.name: team_limit

constraints.description: Helicopter team (team 3) cannot be assigned to zone 2 (storm weather conditions)
constraints.label: Helicopter weather restriction
constraints.name: helicopter_availability

description: Assign 4 rescue teams to 5 disaster zones using BN-predicted survivor probabilities to maximize total survivors rescued while respecting team capabilities and weather constraints.
name: Rescue Team-to-Zone Assignment

objectives.label: Maximize zone 1 rescue priority as primary objective
objectives.name: maximize_total_survivors_rescued

variables.label: Zone assignment for rescue team 1 (ground unit)
variables.name: team_1_zone

variables.label: Zone assignment for rescue team 2 (ground unit)
variables.name: team_2_zone

variables.label: Zone assignment for rescue team 3 (helicopter unit)
variables.name: team_3_zone

variables.label: Zone assignment for rescue team 4 (drone unit)
variables.name: team_4_zone

additional_constraints.description: Ground team 1 cannot enter zone 3 (collapsed buildings from aftershock)
additional_constraints.label: Team 1 avoids collapse zone
additional_constraints.name: aftershock_team_1

additional_constraints.description: Ground team 2 cannot enter zone 3 (collapsed buildings from aftershock)
additional_constraints.label: Team 2 avoids collapse zone
additional_constraints.name: aftershock_team_2

what_if_scenarios.description: Simulate an aftershock that makes collapsed buildings in zone 3 too dangerous for ground teams. Only helicopter and drone teams can enter zone 3. Evaluate impact on rescue coverage.
what_if_scenarios.name: Aftershock Scenario
